name: Dlala Brokerage and Investment Holding Company Q.P.S.C.
summary: Dlala Brokerage and Investment Holding Company Q.P.S.C., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the brokerage activities at the Qatar Exchange. It operates through Stock Broking, Real Estate, and Information Technology segments. The company offers property management, marketing, and sales services for real estate clients; and information technology management and consultation services. It also engages in developing and programming of programs; and investment activities. Dlala Brokerage and Investment Holding Company Q.P.S.C. was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Doha, Qatar.
